text: ' msh' nynvh--sfr chzvn nchvm h'lqshy
b 'l qnv' vnqm yhvh nqm yhvh vb'l chmh nqm yhvh ltsryv vnvtr hv' l'ybyv
g yhvh 'rkh 'fym vgdvl (vgdl) khch vnqh l' ynqh yhvh bsvfh vbsh'rh drkhv v'nn 'bq rglyv
d gv'r bym vybshhv vkhl hnhrvt hchryb 'mll bshn vkhrml vfrch lbnvn 'mll
h hrym r'shv mmnv vhgb'vt htmggv vtsh' h'rts mfnyv vtbl vkhl yvshby bh
v lfny z'mv my y'mvd vmy yqvm bchrvn 'fv chmtv ntkhh kh'sh vhtsrym nttsv mmnv
z tvb yhvh lm'vz byvm tsrh vyd' chsy bv
ch vbshtf 'br khlh y'shh mqvmh v'ybyv yrdf chshkh
t mh tchshbvn 'l yhvh--khlh hv' 'shh l' tqvm f'mym tsrh
y khy 'd syrym sbkhym vkhsb'm sbv'ym 'khlv--khqsh ybsh ml'
y' mmkh yts' chshb 'l yhvh r'h--y'ts bly'l {s}
yb khh 'mr yhvh 'm shlmym vkhn rbym vkhn ngvzv v'br v'ntkh--l' ''nkh 'vd
yg v'th 'shbr mthv m'lykh vmvsrtykh 'ntq
yd vtsvh 'lykh yhvh l' yzr' mshmkh 'vd mbyt 'lhykh 'khryt fsl vmskhh 'shym qbrkh--khy qlvt {f}
' hnh 'l hhrym rgly mbshr mshmy' shlvm--chgy yhvdh chgykh shlmy ndrykh khy l' yvsyf 'vd l'bvr (l'br) bkh bly'l khlh nkhrt
b 'lh mfyts 'l fnykh ntsvr mtsvrh tsfh drkh chzq mtnym 'mts khch m'd
g khy shb yhvh 't g'vn y'qb khg'vn yshr'l khy bqqvm bqqym vzmryhm shchtv
d mgn gbryhv m'dm 'nshy chyl mtl'ym b'sh fldt hrkhb byvm hkhynv vhbrshym hr'lv
h bchvtsvt ythvllv hrkhb yshtqshqvn brchbvt mr'yhn khlfydym--khbrqym yrvtstsv
v yzkhr 'dyryv--ykhshlv bhlkhvtm (bhlykhtm) ymhrv chvmth vhkhn hskhkh
z sh'ry hnhrvt nftchv vhhykhl nmvg
ch vhtsb glth h'lth v'mhtyh mnhgvt khqvl yvnym mtfft 'l lbbhn
t vnynvh khbrkht mym mymy hy' vhmh nsym 'mdv 'mdv v'yn mfnh
y bzv khsf bzv zhb v'yn qtsh ltkhvnh--khbd mkhl khly chmdh
y' bvqh vmbvqh vmblqh vlb nms vfq brkhym vchlchlh bkhl mtnym vfny khlm qbtsv f'rvr
yb 'yh m'vn 'ryvt vmr'h hv' lkhfrym--'shr hlkh 'ryh lby' shm gvr 'ryh v'yn mchryd

yg 'ryh trf bdy grvtyv vmchnq llb'tyv vyml' trf chryv vm'ntyv trfh [ (Nahum 2:14) yd hnny 'lykh n'm yhvh tsb'vt vhb'rty b'shn rkhbh vkhfyrykh t'khl chrb vhkhrty m'rts trfkh vl' yshm' 'vd qvl ml'khkhh {f} ]
' hvy 'yr dmym khlh khchsh frq ml'h--l' ymysh trf
b qvl shvt vqvl r'sh 'vfn vsvs dhr vmrkhbh mrqdh
g frsh m'lh vlhb chrb vbrq chnyt vrb chll vkhbd fgr v'yn qtsh lgvyh ykhshlv (vkhshlv) bgvytm
d mrb znvny zvnh tvbt chn b'lt khshfym hmkhrt gvym bznvnyh vmshfchvt bkhshfyh
h hnny 'lykh n'm yhvh tsb'vt vglyty shvlykh 'l fnykh vhr'yty gvym m'rkh vmmlkhvt qlvnkh
v vhshlkhty 'lykh shqtsym vnbltykh vshmtykh khr'y
z vhyh khl r'ykh ydvd mmkh v'mr shddh nynvh my ynvd lh m'yn 'bqsh mnchmym lkh
ch htytby mn' 'mvn hyshbh by'rym mym sbyb lh--'shr chyl ym mym chvmth
t khvsh 'tsmh vmtsrym v'yn qtsh fvt vlvbym hyv b'zrtkh
y gm hy' lglh hlkhh bshby--gm 'llyh yrtshv br'sh khl chvtsvt v'l nkhbdyh ydv gvrl vkhl gdvlyh rtqv bzqym
y' gm 't tshkhry thy n'lmh gm 't tbqshy m'vz m'vyb
yb khl mbtsrykh--t'nym 'm bkhvrym 'm ynv'v vnflv 'l fy 'vkhl
yg hnh 'mkh nshym bqrbkh l'ybykh ftvch nftchv sh'ry 'rtskh 'khlh 'sh brychykh
yd my mtsvr sh'by lkh chzqy mbtsrykh b'y btyt vrmsy bchmr hchzyqy mlbn
tv shm t'khlkh 'sh--tkhrytkh chrb t'khlkh khylq htkhbd khylq htkhbdy kh'rbh
tz hrbyt rkhlykh mkhvkhby hshmym ylq fsht vy'f
yz mnzrykh kh'rbh vtfsrykh khgvb gby hchvnym bgdrvt byvm qrh--shmsh zrchh vnvdd vl' nvd' mqvmv 'ym
ych nmv r'ykh mlkh 'shvr yshkhnv 'dyrykh nfshv 'mkh 'l hhrym v'yn mqbts
yt 'yn khhh lshbrkh nchlh mkhtkh khl shm'y shm'kh tq'v khf 'lykh--khy 'l my l' 'brh r'tkh tmyd {sh}
